channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 4%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Angela Rayner cleared by HMRC over tax affairs paving the way for potential leadership bid
item.description: Angela Rayner cleared by HMRC over tax affairs paving the way for potential leadership bid

item.title: FT UK Politics: UK manufacturers warn of ‘significant problems’ from steel tariff changes
item.description: UK manufacturers warn of ‘significant problems’ from steel tariff changes

item.title: FT UK Politics: Wes Streeting: the confident performer with a mixed record of reform
item.description: Wes Streeting: the confident performer with a mixed record of reform

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting prepares to launch leadership challenge against Keir Starmer - The Guardian
item.description: Wes Streeting prepares to launch leadership challenge against Keir Starmer - The Guardian

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer vows ‘to fight to win’ against Streeting for Labour leadership with health secretary poised to quit government
item.description: Starmer vows ‘to fight to win’ against Streeting for Labour leadership with health secretary poised to quit government

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer-Streeting latest: Leadership challenge looms from health secretary as Manchester MP denies standing aside for Burnham

item.title: The Guardian: Who would be in Wes Streeting’s corner if he ran for the Labour leadership? - The Guardian
item.description: Who would be in Wes Streeting’s corner if he ran for the Labour leadership? - The Guardian

item.title: The Times: PM ‘vows to fight Wes Streeting leadership challenge’ — as it happened - The Times
item.description: PM ‘vows to fight Wes Streeting leadership challenge’ — as it happened - The Times

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I think the skeleton key to understanding the Starmer-McSweeney project is, ultimately, they think elections are about the position you take, rather than a referendum on 'is the status quo good vs is the alternative s...
item.description: I think the skeleton key to understanding the Starmer-McSweeney project is, ultimately, they think elections are about the position you take, rather than a referendum on 'is the status quo good vs is the alternative s...
